name: Storm Run
description: Navigate through dense obstacles with constant wind (2 m/s² eastward) pushing the drone off course. Full 3D movement. Tests wind compensation, optimal pathing under perturbation, precision.

action_schema.ax: float — acceleration along X axis (m/s²), range [-5.0, 5.0]
action_schema.ay: float — acceleration along Y axis (m/s²), range [-5.0, 5.0]
action_schema.az: float — acceleration along Z axis (m/s²), range [-5.0, 5.0]

observation_space.position: dict — {x, y, z} current drone position in metres
observation_space.velocity: dict — {vx, vy, vz} current drone velocity in m/s
observation_space.target_position: dict — {x, y, z} delivery target position
observation_space.target_direction: list — unit vector [3] pointing towards target
observation_space.done: bool — whether the episode has ended
observation_space.flight_phase: string — GROUND | LIFTING | CRUISING | DESCENDING | LANDED
observation_space.next_waypoint: dict — next A* waypoint or null
observation_space.path_length: int — remaining waypoints on A* path

grader.description: Scores delivery success, distance progress, step efficiency, collision avoidance (safety), and landing smoothness

success_criteria: Navigate through 15 obstacles under constant 2 m/s² eastward wind
Compensate for wind drift to land within 1.5 metres of target
